day2_morning_2.name: Me
day2_morning_2.text: *Less nervous than yesterday. My body is starting to adjust to the school rhythm.*

day2_morning_3.name: Me
day2_morning_3.text: *I wash my face and look in the mirror. Not bad. My expression is brighter than yesterday.*

day2_morning_5.name: Me
day2_morning_5.text: *Old school friends... still no messages. My texts in the group chat show 'Read by 0.'*

day2_morning_6.name: Me
day2_morning_6.text: *...Strange. Minsu hasn't replied either. There's no way he'd go over 24 hours without checking his messages.*

day2_morning_7.name: Me
day2_morning_7.text: *Maybe it's exam season. I'll try again later.*

day2_morning_8.name: Me
day2_morning_8.text: *There's a message from Sea. Sent at 1 AM. 'Sleep well~' ...1 AM? She must have stayed up late.*

day2_morning_9.name: Me
day2_morning_9.text: *I arrive at the school gate and... Sea is standing there.*

day2_morning_sea_1.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_sea_1.text: "Hey! I waited so we could walk together."

day2_morning_sea_2.name: Me
day2_morning_sea_2.text: "...You waited? Oh, thanks, but... what time did you come out?"

day2_morning_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_sea_3.text: "Just a little while ago~ I live close by."

day2_morning_sea_4.name: Me
day2_morning_sea_4.text: *She waited? How did she know what time I'd show up...*

day2_morning_sea_5.name: Me
day2_morning_sea_5.text: *Well, if we come at around the same time, we could just run into each other.*

day2_morning_sea_6.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_sea_6.text: "Did you sleep well? Did you see my message?"

day2_morning_sea_7.name: Me
day2_morning_sea_7.text: "Yeah, slept fine. Thanks for the message."

day2_morning_sea_8.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_sea_8.text: "Glad to hear it. Look forward to today's lunch. I made it even better than yesterday."

day2_morning_sea_9.name: Me
day2_morning_sea_9.text: *Sea holds her bag with both hands as she walks. The lunch must be inside. It looks heavy.*

day2_morning_sea_10.name: Me
day2_morning_sea_10.text: *Sea naturally falls into step beside me and heads toward the classroom. ...I came 10 minutes earlier than usual today, and she was already here waiting.*

day2_morning_sea_11.name: Me
day2_morning_sea_11.text: *As we enter the classroom, a few students say hello.*

day2_morning_class_1.name: Me
day2_morning_class_1.text: *The mood is more relaxed than yesterday. Some kids already know my name.*

day2_morning_class_2.name: Me
day2_morning_class_2.text: *Ms. Eunsu calls attendance with a smile.*

day2_morning_class_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_morning_class_3.text: "Alright, everyone to your seats. ...{name}, how was your first day yesterday? Was everything okay?"

day2_morning_eunsu_1.name: Me
day2_morning_eunsu_1.text: "It was fine, everyone looked after me well."

day2_morning_eunsu_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_morning_eunsu_2.text: "That's great. The kids in our class are kind-hearted."

day2_morning_eunsu_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_morning_eunsu_3.text: "By the way, {name}, you haven't gotten any contact from your previous school, have you?"

day2_morning_eunsu_5.name: Me
day2_morning_eunsu_5.text: *...Why would she ask that? Probably just checking in.*

day2_morning_eunsu_6.name: Homeroom Teacher
day2_morning_eunsu_6.text: "When you transfer, the paperwork takes a while to process. Let me know if you hear anything."

day2_morning_lesson_1.name: Me
day2_morning_lesson_1.text: *Math class. A different teacher is teaching.*

day2_morning_lesson_2.name: Me
day2_morning_lesson_2.text: *Sea quietly holds out a pencil from the side.*

day2_morning_lesson_3.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_lesson_3.text: "(whispering) This teacher has a unique style. Type 6 problems come up a lot."

day2_morning_lesson_4.name: Me
day2_morning_lesson_4.text: *Sea gives me a little smile. She's even giving me test tips. What a reliable class president.*

day2_morning_seolhwa_1.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_1.text: *Sitting down, I glance behind me. Seolhwa is... still there. Same seat, same expression.*

day2_morning_seolhwa_2.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_2.text: *What that guy said yesterday about 'not even knowing she was there' kind of bugs me. Is her presence really that invisible...?*

day2_morning_seolhwa_3.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_3.text: *Strange. There's no name listed for the back seat. The headcount doesn't seem to add up either... Did I miscount?*

day2_morning_seolhwa_4.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_4.text: *Break time. I looked back. My eyes met Seolhwa's.*

day2_morning_seolhwa_5.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_5.text: *...No, they nearly met. The moment our gazes connected, Seolhwa looked away.*

day2_morning_seolhwa_6.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_6.text: *But... her lips moved. Was she trying to say something? Or just yawning?*

day2_morning_seolhwa_7.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_7.text: *The teacher said "Focus!" so I turned back to the front. ...Looking again, Seolhwa is just staring out the window. ...I'll definitely try talking to her tomorrow.*

day2_morning_end.name: Me
day2_morning_end.text: *I see. It must be for administrative reasons. Let's focus on class.*
